author.bio: #IPFS Core Dev. Peer-2-Peer Engineer and Researcher @protocollabs: @mineFilecoin @libp2p @ipld | P2P http://M.Sc. Lecturer at @istecnico. Made @lxjs & @startupscholars
author.name: David Dias

content.text:
js-libp2p just got its first _official_ release #libp2p #JS v0.23.0 🚀 

✔ Test 
✔ Build dist version 
✔ Update Contributors list 
✔ v0.22.0 -> v0.23.0 
✔ Gen Changelog 
✔ Publish to npm 🌟

This is a info release, check all the highlights here:
https://github.com/libp2p/js-libp2p/issues/226
